name: Castro's
tagline: Latin American flavors in Waikiki — empanadas, ceviche, and Cuban sandwiches in a spacious indoor-outdoor space.
parking: Waikiki street parking on Kalakaua Ave; nearby hotel lots
bestTime: Dinner for the full menu. The outdoor patio is nice in the evening
talkStory: Castro's fills the Latin American cuisine gap in Waikiki. The 4.8 rating across 1,200+ reviews is impressive for a relatively new restaurant in one of the most competitive dining corridors in Hawaii. The menu spans Cuban, Peruvian, and Brazilian influences — empanadas, ceviche, rice bowls, and cocktails. The space is modern with a big wooden-beam interior and outdoor seating. A welcome alternative to the typical Waikiki dining options.
